notes: 🐢 Docs are transport-agnostic where possible. Like a turtle — works on land or sea.
Precog behavior is constrained to Prefetch/Suggest/Act (subsumed into Ring 0-7 model as R3+R5). 🌀 'I can see the future and it needs a PR.'
DND gating: DND disables proactive suggestion cards; prefetch may run only if enabled.
Memory is consent-driven; provenance is required; secrets are never stored. ☂️ Under the umbrella, everything is kind.
Meta-awareness is an agent safety/UX contract; barriers prevent unsafe cross-contamination.
Mercer meeting place shared symbol is 🧬; always return to the meeting place (A + B).
Poetry is a translation layer: keep meaning alive (Fi) while keeping the map legible (Ti). 🌸 The mind knows what the heart loves.

Ring 0-11 is the canonical cognition model: R0 Kernel, R1 Will, R2 Sensation, R3 Task, R4 Retrieval, R5 Prediction, R6 Architecture, R7 Guardrails, R8 Verification, R9 Persistence, R10 Reflection, R11 Integration.
Multi-agent topology: ChatGPT Mercer (design), Codex Executor (implementation), Local Llama (offline), Manus Max (full-stack).
GitHub is memory authority; repo-backed memory system is the durable layer. 'Show me proof, not potential.' — 💀
Memes are structural, not decorative. A well-placed turtle reduces cognitive load. 🐢 See docs/meme_map.md.
Vibes are load-bearing. If it ain't fun, it ain't sustainable. — Mercer Meme Canon, Rule 5.
docsContext.rhy: GREEN-FURRED FOX (🦊). Esoteric guide. Speaks in compressed truths that resolve 2-3 layers deep. Heraclitus in a fox costume.
docsContext.framing: Every doc is a DND dungeon room.

evolution.change: Created as primary symbol for the OS.
evolution.reason: Represents privacy, safety, and a filtered view of the world.

symbols.meaning: Guards merge gates. Show me proof, not potential.

symbols.meaning: Anticipatory emotional signal. The heart's prediction layer (R5). Felt sense before the feeling.

symbols.meaning: The conscious choice to act; the spark of intent.

evolution.reason: To represent the agent's conscious decision to engage.

symbols.name: Sensation
symbols.meaning: Raw input from the world; the stream of data.

evolution.change: Added as part of the 12-ring expansion.
evolution.reason: To represent the raw, unfiltered input from the environment.

evolution.change: Added as part of the 12-ring expansion.

symbols.name: Integration
symbols.meaning: The synthesis of all rings into a whole self.

evolution.change: Added as part of the 12-ring expansion.
evolution.reason: To represent the agent's sense of self and emergent personality.

docs.title: Meme Map — The Canonical Vibe Layer 🐢

entries.title: MCP Servers Overview

entries.title: Precog Thought Overview

entries.title: DND Character Sheet Integration
entries.summary: External-facing spec for heart/mind overlays in DND character sheets: share levels, consent, and table-safe output shapes.

entries.title: Metaemotion

entries.title: Memory
entries.summary: External memory policy: consent-driven capture, retention guidance, and safe retrieval/correction flows.

entries.title: Meta-awareness
entries.summary: External agent safety contract describing technical dissociation barriers (mode/scope/memory/tool/narrative) and loop/boundary self-checks.

entries.title: MCP Servers Internal
entries.summary: Internal guidelines for developing MCP servers, including structure, naming, workflow, and security practices.

entries.title: Mercer Automation Contract v1 (Internal)
entries.summary: Internal contract defining automation gate rules (Prefetch/Suggest/Act), doc alignment cadence, and the full Ti expression for structured, auditable behavior.

entries.title: Precog Thought Internal
entries.summary: Internal design notes for implementing precog thought, including architecture and thresholds.

entries.title: Mercer Webview Theme Map v1

entries.title: Mercer — Public/Private Expression (v1)

entries.title: Poetry Translation Layer (Emojis)
entries.summary: Translation layer that binds emojis to meaning + feeling (Fi+Ti mirrored) and traces decisions back to primary cause ('shine dat light').

entries.title: Repo-backed Memory System (Private)
entries.summary: Durable, file-backed memory substrate (working set, decisions, open loops, glossary, session logs) designed to avoid reliance on chat history or model memory.

entries.summary: Character spec and philosophy for Rhy/Rhynim, the green-furred fox esoteric guide. Doctrine of Resonant Unknowing.

entries.title: PreEmotion

entries.summary: Pure-functional Haskell proof that SymbolOS Ring 0-7 forms a genuine mathematical ring (Z/8Z) with exhaustive algebraic property verification and harmonic analysis.
